theme_tagline: The whole world is watching. The gold is already here.
primary_hook: World Cup 2026 final is set: Spain vs Argentina this Sunday at MetLife Stadium. Semifinals just wrapped (Spain 2-0 France, Argentina 2-1 England with a late Messi-led rally).
secondary_hook: Third-place match France vs England Saturday July 18. Today is the rest day — everyone is buzzing, predicting, and reliving semifinal drama.
trending_topic_details: World Cup 2026 dominates every platform. Argentina's stunning late comeback over England is the viral moment of the week; Spain vs Argentina final hype is peaking. Perfect all-audience, non-political trending anchor.
content_angle: Lady E Luck is the VIP box of the Road to the Final — match-day energy, golden-boot deals, and community predictions while the world counts down to Sunday.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot (all day): biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus — 'Score the biggest. Win the boot.'
Hat Trick Bonus (3PM-6PM): 3 recharges during match hours = stacked bonus — 'Three times. Three wins.'
Penalty Kick Free Spin (referral): share code, friend joins = both get a free spin bonus — 'Pass it. They score. You both win.'
Halftime Reload (10PM-Midnight): mystery midnight drop for active players — 'The second half always surprises.'
avoid: real team logos or player likenesses
